Legal

Terms & Conditions

The terms that govern registration for and participation in BdMSO programs.

Last updated: 23 May 2026

1. Acceptance of these terms

By registering for or participating in any BdMSO (Bangladesh Mathematics & Science Olympiad) program, you - the guardian, acting on behalf of the student - agree to these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree, please do not register.

2. Eligibility

Each program is intended for primary-school students within the age and class limits stated for that program. Guardians are responsible for ensuring their child meets the eligibility criteria of the program they register for. A registration found to be ineligible may be cancelled.

3. Registration and accounts

  • Registration is completed online through this website. You must provide accurate, complete and current information.
  • Each guardian account is responsible for keeping its login details secure.
  • A student may register for either the BdMSO National Olympiad or the BdMSO Quiz Competition - not both.

4. Fees and payment

Program fees are shown at the point of registration and are paid through the website's payment gateway. A registration is confirmed only once payment has been completed successfully. All payments made through the BdMSO website are non-refundable.

5. Participation and conduct

Students and guardians are expected to follow the instructions of BdMSO organizers and venue staff and to maintain honest, respectful conduct. Misconduct, or any attempt at unfair means during an exam or competition, may lead to disqualification without a refund.

6. Schedule and changes

Dates, venues, formats and program details may change. BdMSO will make reasonable effort to communicate changes in advance through the website or your registered contact details, and may postpone or cancel a program due to circumstances beyond its control.

7. Photography and media

BdMSO programs may be photographed or recorded. By participating, you consent to BdMSO using such images and recordings for educational, promotional and archival purposes. If you do not wish your child to appear in such media, please contact us in writing before the program.

8. Data and privacy

Information provided during registration is used to administer registration, communication, examinations, results and certificates. BdMSO does not sell personal data and shares it only as needed to run its programs.

9. Limitation of liability

Guardians are responsible for the supervision, safety and transport of their child to and from program venues. To the extent permitted by law, BdMSO and its partners are not liable for any loss, injury or damage except where caused by their own negligence.

10. Changes to these terms

BdMSO may update these Terms & Conditions from time to time. The version published on this page at the time of your registration applies to that registration.

11. Contact

For any questions about these terms, email support@bdmso.org.
